overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing a white-haired warrior with two swords exploring a dimly lit gothic castle interior, descending stone staircases and walking through vaulted corridors and a large hall with wooden scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper chamber with large lattice windows

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone chamber toward a staircase

entered.detail: large arched window with stone mullions allowing natural light
thick stone column supporting the ceiling
dark wooden furniture with candles on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an upper stone chamber illuminated by natural light filtering through large lattice windows. Stone pillars and wooden furniture line the sides of the room as the character approaches a descending staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase with wooden railings

events.description: character enters the stairwell from the upper chamber

agents.ego_description: walking down a curved stone staircase with wooden handrails

entered.detail: curved stone steps descending to lower level
rough wooden railing along the staircase
burning torch mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow, winding stone staircase illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Wooden handrails line the right side as the camera follows the descent into the lower levels of the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic arched corridor with vaulted ceiling

events.description: exits staircase into a corridor with gothic arches

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone corridor with vaulted ceilings

entered.detail: pointed stone arches forming the corridor ceiling
rough-hewn stone wall with narrow windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor featuring gothic pointed arches and stone walls lit by intermittent wall torches. The space feels enclosed and medieval, with small windows providing minimal natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with wooden scaffolding and construction barriers

events.description: enters a large hall with wooden scaffolding and barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through a large hall with wooden structures toward a distant fire

entered.detail: rough wooden beams and planks forming construction scaffolding
large stone archway at the far end of the hall
burning fire providing warm orange light in the distance
wooden plank barriers blocking off sections of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious great hall filled with wooden scaffolding and construction barriers. The space opens up significantly from the narrow corridor, with a distant fire providing the primary light source. The character continues walking through this industrial-looking interior toward the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright upper chamber down into the claustrophobic depths of a gothic castle before opening into a vast, industrial hall. It begins in a stone room illuminated by natural light filtering through large lattice windows, moving past pillars and furniture toward a descending staircase. As the character descends the narrow, winding stairs, the bright daylight fades and is replaced by the flickering glow of wall-mounted torches. The scene then shifts into a tight, enclosed corridor of pointed gothic arches and minimal light before finally expanding into a spacious great hall filled with wooden scaffolding and construction barriers. The camera continues forward through this wide interior, guided by the distant light of a fire at the far end of the hall.
